verse_text: Judge not, that you be not judged.

links.context: Here, as in 2:15, judge (Gr. anakrinein) is difficult to render in English. Anakrinein is comparable to the investigation that takes place before and during a trial and preceding judgment; krinein (v. 5; [[MAT.7:1]]), to rendering of a verdict. Many Corinthians prejudged Paul as an unfaithful steward; some denied his apostolic authority (see Introduction to 2 Corinthians). For Paul it is improper for them, or even for himself, to prejudge his life, for Christ is the Judge.
